since_last: 50% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.70%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 50% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.67% · BTC +0.65% · Gold +0.15% · Nasdaq100 +0.62%. 50% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.70%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.70%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.55%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -25.86%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +6.15%, POWL +5.61%, GOOGL +4.69%, VST +4.50%, BBAI +3.71%. Laggards: IBM -25.86%, DELL -10.57%, SKHY -10.04%, CSCO -6.31%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.49% at $136.74
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.49% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
